title: Pythian 8: Creatures of a Day
description: Pindar's meditation on human mortality: 'What is someone? What is no one? A shadow's dream is man.'
introduction: Pindar's meditation on human mortality: 'What is someone? What is no one? A shadow's dream is man.'

translation.original_text: ἐπάμεροι· τί δέ τις; τί δ᾿ οὔ τις; σκιᾶς ὄναρ ἄνθρωπος.
translation.text: Creatures of a day. What is someone? What is no one? A shadow's dream is man. But when a god-given gleam comes, a bright light rests upon men, and a gentle life.
